programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood delves into the ITV Sport archives to take a look back at James Hunt, Barry Sheene and a spectacular crash by Kelvin Burt.(n)

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: The duo try to track down an American colonel tormented by memories his harrowing experiences while in command of an air base in Vietnam. Robert Vaughn and Nyree Dawn Porter star.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An interpreter claims to have been abducted by two villains who forced him to interrogate a badly bruised and obviously distressed Greek captive unable to speak English. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett.(n)

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Game show in which two celebrity guests take part in a series of fishing challenges. In the first episode, owner of the Sugar Hut nightclub Mick Norcross brings along his friend, Hollywood actor Tamer Hassan, but things get off to a bad start when Tamer announces that he cannot think of anything worse than golf or fishing. With team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey.(n)

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Tom Dove and Neil Spooner at the renowned Gigantica Lakes complex in the Champagne region of France, hoping to hook a huge fish.(n)

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove buy and transform a BSA Bantam from a humble roadster into a trial bike. However, they soon discover it is far easier to restore than it is to sell.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A solicitor enlists Holmes to help clear him of murdering eccentric builder Jonas Oldacre, whose considerable personal fortune he stood to inherit. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett as the famed Victorian detective.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: Sherlock Holmes: The Sign of Four
programme.desc: Holmes is presented with a mystery surrounding a woman's unknown benefactor - and uncovers a story of hidden treasure, implacable vengeance and sudden death. Feature-length drama, starring Jeremy Brett, Edward Hardwicke, John Thaw and Jenny Seagrove.(n)

programme.title: Lonely Are the Brave (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious modern-day cowboy breaks out of jail and escapes on horseback - but reckons without the relentlessness of the authorities, who give chase by car and helicopter. A dogged sheriff leads the pursuit, coming to sympathise with his quarry. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Walter Matthau, Gena Rowlands and George Kennedy.(n)

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever (1971)
programme.desc: James Bond investigates a diamond-smuggling operation, and discovers that behind the scheme is his insidious arch-enemy Blofeld, who is planning to construct a devastating orbital doomsday weapon powered by the precious stones, which will force world powers to disarm and give him global domination. Spy adventure, starring Sean Connery, Jill St John, Charles Gray, Bernard Lee and Lois Maxwell.(n)

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever (1971)

Spy adventure, starring Sean Connery, Jill St John, Charles Gray, Bernard Lee and Lois Maxwell.(n)

programme.title: Euro 96 Relived
programme.desc: Scotland v England. A full re-run of the Group A encounter at Wembley Stadium. Both sides were looking for a first victory in the competition after drawing their openers against the Netherlands and Switzerland respectively, and it was Paul Gascoigne who stole the headlines with a famous goal. Jim Rosenthal presented the coverage, with pre-match analysis from Alex Ferguson and Jack Charlton.(n)

programme.title: A Fistful of Dollars (1964)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunslinger rides into a town on the Mexican border divided by two warring families. After killing the henchmen of one clan, he seems to have made it clear where his loyalties lie and is hired by their rivals. However, he is secretly planning to play them off against each other to his own advantage. Sergio Leone's Western, with Clint Eastwood making his first appearance as The Man with No Name alongside Gian Maria Volonte and Marianne Koch.(n)

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest entertainment news.(n)

Sergio Leone's Western, with Clint Eastwood making his first appearance as The Man with No Name alongside Gian Maria Volonte and Marianne Koch.(n)

programme.title: Get Carter (1971)
programme.desc: Racketeer Jack Carter returns to his native Newcastle to attend his brother's funeral and investigate the circumstances surrounding his death. As events unfold, he uncovers troubling connections to drugs, pornography and corruption, and finds himself on a collision-course with a criminal kingpin and his cohorts. Mike Hodges' thriller, starring Michael Caine, Ian Hendry, Britt Ekland, Glynn Edwards and John Osborne.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Harry becomes embroiled with a fascist Prince while delivering a dispatch case to an address in Rome. Drama, starring Robert Vaughn, Nyree Dawn Porter and Tony Anholt.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.sub-title: Slow Boat to Madness - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As more new cases of the mystery illness break out on board the luxury liner, Quincy and Dr Carlisle work against the clock to identify the root of the epidemic.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Part two of two. The body discovered in the stolen Rolls Royce is identified, while Theo tries to track down the woman who killed her husband before she can commit suicide.(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Moriarty seeks revenge on Holmes for foiling his plan to sell the Mona Lisa, and the pair ultimately fight their final battle at the Reichenbach Falls in Switzerland. Jeremy Brett stars as the titular hero, with David Burke making his final appearance as Dr Watson and Eric Porter as Moriarty.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur buys a large consignment of wine, supposedly brewed by monks. Before he can collect his order it is impounded, but he sneaks into a warehouse and retrieves it anyway. However, a disastrous tasting session at the Winchester reveals the product to be 'corked' and undrinkable and when he and Ray return it in the hope of a later refund they get locked in. George Cole and Gary Webster star.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle infiltrate a gang smuggling art treasures and industrial secrets out of the country and selling them on to foreign powers. As the investigation proceeds, the duo discover the illicit operation is being run by a country squire in his stately home. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A routine surveillance assignment leads Regan and Carter to a massive car-parking fraud. Crackerjack veteran Peter Glaze features in the supporting cast, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A woman suffering from post-traumatic amnesia is pushed down an escalator at a job fair and Jack discovers an assassin has targeted her.(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck cop with a gambling problem ends up owing money to a gangster - who offers to clear the debt if he kills Crocker. Guest starring Judith Light (Ugly Betty).(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The great detective reveals to a startled Watson how he defeated Moriarty and cheated death beneath the waters of the Reichenbach Falls. Period drama, marking Edward Hardwicke's debut as Holmes' indefatigable chronicler.(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's other half, 'er Indoors, disappears and he finds himself under suspicion of burying her on the forecourt in order to use the insurance money to prop up his dubious business ventures. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A recently released convict causes chaos when he takes a group of hospital patients hostage. Bodie and Doyle try to get to him before he can start shooting. Drama, starring Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson.(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: An antiques shop is used as a point of access in a bank robbery, and it looks like an inside job, but Regan suspects otherwise and soon finds himself on a collision course with Haskins. Police drama, starring John Thaw, Dennis Waterman and Garfield Morgan.(n)

programme.title: Brian Moore Meets
programme.desc: A classic 1979 interview with the former striker during his time at Hamburg SV. Keegan had recently been crowned European Footballer of the Year, and cameras reveal how he was ahead of his time in terms of realising his commercial potential.(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits southern Africa to see if he can track down a deadly fish that lurks in the eerie waters of the Okavango. A killer with shark-like teeth, there are stories of it hunting in packs and feeding on schooling fish or even human bodies. Jeremy is determined to find out if it is a giant piranha or something equally terrifying.(n)

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade takes on Africa's wild Zambezi River to find an unknown predator dragging fishermen to their deaths. Crocodiles and hippos are guilty of killing dozens of victims in plain view, yet it is said there is another monstrous beast stalking these deep and turbulent waters. Locals speak of 'the Mazunda' - but what is this sinister, child-swallowing creature?(n)

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz.(n)

programme.desc: A mysterious gunslinger rides into a town on the Mexican border divided by two warring families. After killing the henchmen of one clan, he seems to have made it clear where his loyalties lie and is hired by their rivals. However, he is secretly planning to play them off against each other to his own advantage. Sergio Leone's Western, with Clint Eastwood making his first appearance as The Man with No Name alongside Gian Maria Volonte and Marianne Koch.(n)

Passengers have a chance to explore the ancient art of the San people and visit a vineyard that produces some of South Africa's finest wines. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.desc: Pursued by a helicopter and a team of armed response vehicles, two men armed with machetes and a sawn-off shotgun make a dramatic escape on a motorbike. Meanwhile, officers Clarkie and Nick take two dangerous boy racers off the road, and a high-speed pursuit of alleged burglars turns into a race on foot.(n)

programme.title: Police: Hour of Duty
programme.desc: Officers attend a notorious pub where a man has been found with facial wounds following an assault, but none of the customers admit to having seen anything or want to talk about what happened, so CCTV footage is analysed to try to piece together the case. Meanwhile, police are dispatched by a call handler when a woman reports she is being threatened in her car by four men in balaclavas.(n)

programme.title: Inside Broadmoor: Criminally Insane
programme.desc: Documentary charting the history of the high-security psychiatric hospital from the Victorian era to the present day, examining the diverse treatments and regimes that have been applied during the 150 years it has been in operation.(n)

programme.title: Ian Brady: The Moors Murderer
programme.desc: Documentary originally made to mark half a century since the Moors murderer was sentenced to life imprisonment. Among the contributors are prison officers, detectives, relatives of victims, pen pals and inmates who served time with him. They reveal how Brady showed a psychopathic lack of connection with his crimes.(n)

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter.(n)

programme.title: Animal Farm (1954)
programme.desc: Animals rebel against their unscrupulous owner and take control of his farm, vowing to run things fairly, with equality for all. However, the pigs leading the revolt succumb to greed and corruption, culminating in violence and oppression. Animated drama based on George Orwell's novel, narrated by Gordon Heath and with Maurice Denham providing the voices for all the characters.(n)

programme.title: The Choice (2016)
programme.desc: Two neighbours find themselves overwhelmingly attracted to each other, and make substantial changes in their lives to be together - one breaking off a long-term relationship and the other conquering his fear of commitment. Over the next 10 years, their feelings for each other are tested by a series of challenges. Romantic drama based on Nicholas Sparks' novel, starring Benjamin Walker and Teresa Palmer.(n)

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Battle of the Smithsonian (2009)
programme.desc: The living exhibits at New York's Museum of Natural History are shipped to Washington's Smithsonian Institution - along with the artefact that brought them to life in the first place. Nightwatchman Larry tries to retrieve it, only to find the contents of the world's largest museum have been reanimated, including a pharaoh determined to take over the world. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Amy Adams, Owen Wilson and Steve Coogan.(n)

programme.title: Cowboys & Aliens (2011)
programme.desc: A Wild-West town dominated by a cattle baron comes under attack by invaders from another world. It falls to a mysterious stranger with no memory to unite the townsfolk, a gang of outlaws and an Apache tribe, in a bid to fight back against the aliens, and learn the truth about his own past. Sci-fi Western, with Daniel Craig, Harrison Ford, Olivia Wilde and Sam Rockwell.(n)

programme.title: Disturbia (2007)
programme.desc: A troubled teenager is sentenced to three months under house arrest for attacking a teacher, and passes the time by spying on his neighbours. However, one day he notices something suspicious and becomes convinced one of them is a serial killer. Thriller, starring Shia LaBeouf, Carrie-Anne Moss, David Morse and Sarah Roemer.(n)

programme.title: Attack the Block (2011)
programme.desc: A student nurse living in a south London tower block escapes a dangerous encounter with a teenage gang when aliens invade. As the creatures cause mayhem throughout the estate, she joins forces with her would-be attackers to fight off the extraterrestrial forces. Sci-fi comedy thriller, with Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega and Nick Frost.(n)

programme.title: White God (2014)
programme.desc: Teenager Lili is devastated when her father chooses to abandon her beloved dog Hagen on the streets, rather than pay a new tax on non-pedigree canines. She sets out to find her pet, while Hagen embarks on an adventure of his own that sees him joining forces with a pack of fellow crossbreeds. Drama, starring Zsofia Psotta and Sandor Zsoter. In Hungarian and English.(n)

programme.title: Kidnapped (1971)
programme.desc: A naive young man is cheated out of his inheritance by his conniving uncle, who sells him to the captain of a slave ship. On board he forms an alliance with a hardened rebel, and the pair make their escape when the ship is wrecked on the Scottish coast. Period adventure based on Robert Louis Stevenson's novel set during the Jacobite Uprising, with Michael Caine, Lawrence Douglas, Trevor Howard, Jack Hawkins and Donald Pleasence.(n)

programme.title: The Perfect Catch (2005)
programme.desc: Unlikely couple Ben and Lindsey meet and fall in love over the winter. When summer brings a new baseball season, Lindsey discovers Ben's devotion to the Boston Red Sox baseball team knows no bounds - and suspects she will always come second. The Farrelly brothers' romantic comedy, starring Jimmy Fallon and Drew Barrymore, inspired by Nick Hornby's football-themed novel Fever Pitch, but with America's favourite sport replacing Britain's.(n)

programme.title: Hotel for Dogs (2009)
programme.desc: An orphaned brother and sister face losing their beloved dog when they go into a foster home that does not allow pets. The kids find the ideal hiding place in an abandoned hotel, and set about transforming it into luxury canine accommodation for not just their beloved pet, but every stray in town. Family comedy, starring Emma Roberts, Jake T Austin, Don Cheadle and Lisa Kudrow.(n)

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen.(n)

programme.title: Europa Report (2013)
programme.desc: A privately funded spaceship with an international crew is sent to investigate the potential of Jupiter's fourth largest moon to support life, but technical glitches and human error plunge the astronauts into extreme danger. Found footage sci-fi thriller, starring Daniel Wu, Sharlto Copley and Michael Nyqvist.(n)

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit (2014)
programme.desc: A former soldier injured in the line of duty takes up a new career as a financial analyst for the CIA. However, his deskbound position changes to a dangerous undercover assignment when he discovers a plot to destroy the US economy. Spy thriller inspired by Tom Clancy's series of novels, starring Chris Pine, Keira Knightley, Kevin Costner and Kenneth Branagh, who also directed.(n)

programme.title: Rush (2013)
programme.desc: The 1976 Formula One Championship season is dominated by a fierce rivalry between two contrasting racers, as daredevil British driver James Hunt and methodical Austrian defending champion Niki Lauda put their lives on the line to outdo each other on the track. Fact-based drama, starring Chris Hemsworth, Daniel Bruhl and Olivia Wilde.(n)

programme.title: Good Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A veteran fighter pilot is reassigned as a drone operator, but longs to return to flying planes personally. His marriage begins to suffer as he struggles to cope with the ethical issues and immense psychological pressure of his work, particularly when he is forced to take orders from the CIA. Drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Zoe Kravitz and January Jones.(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: The inside story of the characters and narrative of HERE/NOT HERE, the deaf hip hop music drama.(n)

programme.title: When Eight Bells Toll (1971)
programme.desc: A Navy intelligence agent heads to Scotland, where he poses as a marine biologist to investigate the theft of millions of pounds in gold bullion from ships off the British coast. However, the locals counter his enquiries with hostility, especially when he sets his sights on a Greek tycoon, whom he suspects may be operating as a modern-day pirate. Thriller, with Anthony Hopkins, Robert Morley and Jack Hawkins. Based on a novel by Alistair MacLean.(n)

programme.title: Cottage to Let (1941)
programme.desc: A British inventor's revolutionary bombsight is set to have a positive impact on the war effort. However, military intelligence detects the Nazis are aware of the invention, while a plucky teenage cockney evacuated to the boffin's Scottish country estate sets out to expose a German spy ring. Second World War thriller, with Leslie Banks, John Mills, Alastair Sim and George Cole in his screen debut.(n)

programme.title: Campbell's Kingdom (1957)
programme.desc: A man who has only six months to live returns to the land his family owns in the Canadian Rockies. He intends to prove his grandfather's frequently derided theory that there is oil to be found there, but he has little time to find it, as the area will be flooded when construction is completed on a nearby dam. Adventure, with Dirk Bogarde, Stanley Baker, Michael Craig and Barbara Murray.(n)

programme.title: Destroyer (1943)
programme.desc: A former welder working on the Navy destroyer whose construction he oversaw angers his crewmates with his relentless quest for perfection. Wartime adventure, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford, Marguerite Chapman and Regis Toomey.(n)

programme.title: The Maze Runner (2014)
programme.desc: A teen arrives in an isolated community of youngsters, with no memory of who he is or the outside world. When another new arrival brings an ominous message, he realises time is running out for the group and they must find an escape route through a deadly labyrinth if they are to survive. Sci-fi adventure based on James Dashner's novel, starring Dylan O'Brien, Kaya Scodelario and Patricia Clarkson.(n)

programme.title: Split (2016)
programme.desc: After being abducted by a kidnapper with multiple personalities, three young women are soon engaged in a fight for survival. Meanwhile, an oblivious psychiatrist tries to ease her patient's fractured mind as a 24th character with apparent superhuman abilities attempts to dominate his body. M Night Shyamalan's thriller, starring James McAvoy, Anya Taylor-Joy and Betty Buckley.(n)

programme.title: The Warrior (2001)
programme.desc: A warrior vows to give up his violent ways after a crisis of conscience, but his master is left fuming at this unexpected change of heart, and sends hired killers to exact a suitably bloody revenge. A trek through the Himalayas ensues, as the former champion sets out to find inner peace - with his pursuers hot on his tail. Historical drama, starring Irrfan Khan, Puru Chhibber and Sheikh Annuddin. In Hindi.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Bridgeport, Connecticut, to visit Cafe Tavolini, which is being neglected by husband and wife managers teetering on the edge of divorce. The estranged couple's two children are struggling to save the business from their parents' disputes, and the visiting chef tries to shock the pair into stopping the restaurant from becoming a casualty of their quarrel.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former boxing champ and groom-to-be Jordan plans a fight-night wedding in front of thousands of people, but his fiancee Danielle dreams of a girly and intimate wedding day.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes she'll take a leap of faith to be his wife.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam's plan to reignite his fading relationship with Dana by taking her to a 'Weird Al' Yankovic concert backfires. When Barry and Erica become peer counsellors at school, they worry that Murray may be feeling depressed. 'Weird Al' Yankovic and Tim Meadows guest star.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry seeks fresh inspiration when he loses his standing as a champion athlete at school and attempts to introduce a new sport to his friends. Murray refuses to let Beverly help out at the furniture shop when sales take a nosedive, but she's convinced the latest home furnishing craze holds the answer.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As they bond over their shared love for the movie Dirty Dancing, Beverly is thrilled when Erica suggests the film as the theme for the upcoming school dance. However, Principal Ball refuses to sanction anything with the word 'dirty' in the title, threatening Erica with suspension if she persists with the idea. Barry lobbies for the dance to be based on his favourite movie Footloose, while Adam and Pops encourage Murray to learn to dance in order to make Beverly happy.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff struggles to balance demands from the Jenkintown Posse and Erica. Meanwhile, Adam faces a crisis of confidence over his career path.(n)

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Lainey has a realisation about CB, and Principal Glascott uses the season's bad football team to teach Coach Mellor how to be both a good winner and a good loser.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and the squad must track down a hacker who has infiltrated the precinct's servers, compromising protected information on undercover agents. Rosa deals with relationship issues, while Hitchcock and Scully attempt to cook the perfect lasagne.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A prank goes disastrously wrong, destroying a crucial piece of evidence, leaving the officers trying to solve the mystery - with the help of visiting Detective Dillman (JK Simmons).(n)

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon goes to great lengths to convince Amy that they should have a baby together after they successfully complete a scientific experiment using their DNA samples. Raj is too embarrassed to tell his friends what the new woman in his life does for a living.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon cannot contain his jealousy when he hears that his university colleague Bert has won a prestigious fellowship with an impressive grant. Elsewhere, Howard finds an old remote-controlled toy he made in the past, but the rest of the group do not seemed to be too impressed by it. Stephen Hawking guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy's attempts to celebrate her birthday with an intimate night at home are interrupted by the news that Bernadette has gone into labour. However, it transpires that Howard, Raj and Stuart may have rushed the expectant mother to the hospital too early, with Raj having difficulty keeping the gender of the unborn child a secret.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Secret Letter and a Lowly Disc of Processed Meat
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster discovers that Mary has been keeping a secret about his future. Meemaw is furious when she learns Dale fired Georgie.(n)

programme.title: Taken 2 (2012)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Bryan Mills and his ex-wife Lenore are taken hostage in Istanbul by an Albanian gangster, whose son Bryan killed while bringing down a kidnapping ring. He is able to escape with the aid of his daughter, and together they fight to rescue Lenore and wipe out the criminal family. Action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Maggie Grace and Famke Janssen.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces in the US turn their hand to being the country's most opinionated viewers as they critique the week's TV. programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions of the week's biggest and best shows, including Alan Carr: Chatty Man, The Murder Detectives, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Hunt, The Supervet, Braveheart and the news headlines. First aired in December 2015.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during a single week in December 2015, including The Royal Variety Performance, the Turner Prize, Meet the Psychopaths, I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Secret Life of 6 Year Olds, Single White Female and the news. The programme captures their instant reactions and lively - sometimes emotional - discussions from the comfort of their own homes.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Twin sisters visit the restaurant, each looking for their Prince Charming - but while Francesca appears to be smitten by former boarding school pupil Hugo, Claudia has been hurt too many times before, and her guard is up with rapper Marcus. Maths teacher and human calculator Ian is looking for someone to help him get over his awkwardness, and hopes radiographer Rachel will be the one, while firefighter Marc meets Marilyn Monroe lookalike Elle - will it be a case of some like it hot? Do gentlemen definitely prefer blondes? Or will they turn out to be misfits?(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More singletons meet up for a blind date, including former boarding school pupil Hugo, who is back for a second shot at love. Trainee opera singer Olympia takes centre stage for his encore performance - but will she hit all the right notes to win him over? Other hopefuls include ex-Playboy bunny Jacqui, who is paired up with ex-stripper Ricky, and sensitive soul Steven, who is hoping to find someone who will get along with the most important lady in his life - his nan. Will keen knitter Anna fit the bill?(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former boxing champ and groom-to-be Jordan plans a fight-night wedding in front of thousands of people, but his fiancee Danielle dreams of a girly and intimate wedding day.(n)

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmin's dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Love Island star Jack Fincham begins a week of dinner parties, treating Abz Love, Tracy Beaker star Dani Harmer, Made in Chelsea's Mark Francis and Pants on Fire comedy duo Donna and Verona to a menu of European bistro favourites.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Dani Harmer is the next to host, but having never chopped an onion before, let alone thrown a dinner party, it proves to be a night of firsts for the Tracy Beaker star.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me

Mark is out to impress Love Island champion Jack Fincham, CBBC star Dani Harmer, boy band member Abz from Five and Pants on Fire comedy duo Donna and Veron.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam joins a mail-order music club, aiming to assemble an enviable cassette tape collection. He takes advantage of the 12 tapes for a penny promotion by opening multiple accounts with the club using fake names to get as much music as possible, but has no intention of continuing the monthly contracts. However, when Beverly discovers the scam she blames Erica. Barry asks Murray for help when he realises Lainey's dad Bill doesn't like him.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired to become a magician, Adam attempts to use his new magic act to attract girls at school, but is thwarted when Beverly insists on taking to the stage as his assistant. Murray is alarmed when Barry refuses to study for a college entrance exam with his peers.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard attempt to distract Sheldon with a trip to a historic railway when he slows the progress of their work on the Air Force guidance system. Raj and Stuart look after baby Halley, while Penny and Amy take Bernadette out.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is furious when she learns that Sheldon has shared intimate details of their relationship with his colleagues at the university, prompting their first fight since moving in together. Raj considers trying to live without financial support from his father, who thinks he is spoilt.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Cut off from his father's fortune, Raj struggles to balance his books, so decides to appoint Sheldon to organise his finances and get him out of debt. Penny considers joining the guys at Comic-Con because she thinks Leonard wants her to come along.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny offer Sheldon's old room to Raj after he is forced to move out of his apartment to save money, leading to unexpected conflict among the gang and some unwanted observations from Leonard's mother. Christine Baranski guests.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project.(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2 (2011)
programme.desc: Martial arts master panda Po continues to hone his skills when an evil peacock, who was banished from China for trying to build a deadly new weapon, returns to cause more chaos. It falls to Po to defeat him, but he suffers strange flashbacks revealing a connection between his past and the sinister bird. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jack Black and Gary Oldman.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: Kate and Alice continue their sister/nemesis dance, while Alice and Mouse construct their most evil plan yet. Mary invites Kate to a special event honouring Catherine.(n)

Simon's online relationship with Shygirl18 blossoms and Kelly's restorative justice session ends in disaster. The friends also discover that builders are digging a hole where they buried the bodies. Comedy drama, starring Lauren Socha, Nathan Stewart-Jarrett, Iwan Rheon, Antonia Thomas and Robert Sheehan.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook.(n)

programme.title: Supernatural
programme.desc: Sam and Dean join forces with an unexpected ally, and Heaven faces an attack from a dark force, driving Castiel to make an enormous sacrifice to make things right.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Hilda feels that her biological clock is ticking, so she sends it away to have it slowed down. But when Sabrina goes to retrieve the clock she loses it, leaving her aunt in a huge rush to marry and have a child.(n)

programme.desc: Joe plans to admit his feelings for Mel after their romantic night in New Jersey, but is stopped when he finds out her ex-boyfriend Austin wants to give the relationship a second chance. Meanwhile, Ryder makes himself sick through his own cooking.(n)

programme.desc: Riley invites Ben to be her date at a work party, but his efforts to prove he is dependable fall short, and Danny hopes to come to her rescue instead. programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben discovers a shocking secret about Riley's new love Fitch, while things heat up between Danny and girlfriend Milena, and Tucker seizes an opportunity to impress his boss Chase. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly tries to help Adam navigate a painless path through puberty, but just as his voice is changing, he is cast in the lead role of the school musical. Determined to help him survive the performance, Beverly decides lip-synching might be the answer. Meanwhile, Murray is irked when Erica chooses musician Johnny over Barry's sidekick Geoff as her date for the homecoming dance.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry accidentally records over one of Beverly's prized family videotapes - her treasured keepsake from his fifth birthday party. Meanwhile, Adam and Murray build a robot together, but the project comes between them when they experience creative differences.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jeffords becomes anxious about his upcoming lieutenant's exam, Peralta, Captain Holt and the squad decide to distract him from the stress by holding the precinct's annual Halloween Heist on a new date, Cinco de Mayo.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate a serial killer who poses a severe danger to the public. Captain Holt continues to spar with his rival, Commissioner Kelly. Jeffords must deal with some complications resulting from his recent news about his lieutenant's exam.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard has a meeting with Colonel Williams, a representative from the Air Force Department of Material Command, about the gyroscope he invented with Leonard and Sheldon. Penny accidentally reveals that Bernadette is pregnant to their colleagues at work. Dean Norris guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Tensions rise when the guys struggle to complete their Air Force project on time and are forced to work around the clock - leaving Sheldon fighting to stay awake. Penny and Amy attend a university gathering at the home of Bert the geologist. Raj learns Bernadette's true feelings about her pregnancy when he helps her to clear out the spare room for a nursery.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe volunteer at the school dance, but get themselves kicked out by the school's vice principal for bad behaviour. Meanwhile, Ryder considers breaking up with Stella. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel takes Joe's side when he is involved in a hit-and-run accident, until she discovers that the other driver is her beloved hairdresser Calista. programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben offers to dog-sit for his girlfriend Megan, but the animal does not seem to like him much. Elsewhere, Tucker is angered by his room-mates' messy habits, so Danny hires someone to clean the apartment. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben persuades Bonnie and Ray to invite his conservative Aunt Betty to Emma's baptism in the hope she will give the baby a generous gift, but this means hiding Ray's sexuality from her. Meanwhile, Riley makes Tucker and Danny compete to be chosen as the godfather.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake's favourite pizzeria burns down, the fire marshal (Patton Oswalt) believes the owner should be the prime suspect in the investigation. programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: In an attempt to get closer to Barry and Erica, Beverly promises to bring actor Scott Baio to town for a big charity event. Adam gets into a tricky situation when he arranges to take both his best friend Emmy and his girlfriend Dana to the school dance.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After watching a particular game show together for years, Adam and Emmy are excited to learn that the producers will be holding auditions at their school. Beverly turns to Bill for help when Barry and Murray become convinced that she is a lucky charm for their beleaguered football team.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's trip to his mother's, Leonard and Penny recall their Christmas tree adventure, and Howard and Bernadette open up about their first days as parents.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host this week is Jay Hutton from Tattoo Fixers, whose guests are actor Steven Arnold and Ewen MacIntosh and reality stars Charlotte Crosby and Dawn Ward.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One that Went off the Rails
programme.desc: Self-conscious groom-to-be Richard plans a first-class trip for his straight-talking bride Latrice on her wedding day.(n)

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Two more singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who will be revealed to them one body part at a time. After nine months of being single, 23-year-old university graduate Sapphire from Kent has decided to see if she can find her ideal woman by stripping back the layers. Thirty-two-year-old account manager Kieron from Basingstoke has spent the past three years single to focus on his career, but now he's ready to put finding a partner at the top of his to do list. Anna Richardson hosts.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Nidderdale agricultural show in the Yorkshire Dales, where she learns how to make her own pork pies and sausages. However, her success jeopardised by problems the evening before the event.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi takes Savita and Vinod Patel from Hertfordshire house-hunting in and around the picturesque town of Denia on Spain's Costa Blanca. The couple must choose between the convenience of the town and the amazing views on offer just a little farther afield.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Peter and Karen Greaves from Wiltshire want a bolthole on Spain's Costa Blanca that they can escape to at a moment's notice. Sara Damergi shows them a selection of properties for £50,000 or less.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Bedfordshire couple John and Elaine Want plan a permanent move to the Alicante region of southern Spain, and Sara Damergi takes them to view potential homes within their budget of £70,000.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with two pairs of house-hunters. Chris and Nicola from Hastings were newlyweds searching for their dream home nine years ago, while couple Trudi and Steve relocated from Edinburgh to North Yorkshire in order to be closer to family.(n)

programme.title: Phil Spencer's Stately Homes
programme.desc: Phil explores Blenheim Palace in Oxfordshire, which Lady Henrietta Spencer-Churchill explains was a gift to the Marlborough family from their friend Queen Anne. He also discovers the disastrous story of the house's construction, involving spiralling costs, fall-outs with the architect and unpaid builders, and works out how much the entire project would cost in modern money.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Claire Wier hosts the first party in Worcestershire and hopes her low-fat menu and pre-dinner exercise routines are enough to secure her the £1,000 prize. However, her guests are disappointed that the evening meal is lacking in cream, fat, oil and butter.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty pageant queen Pippa Langhorne throws the second party in Worcestershire, and hopes to impress her fellow diners with a sophisticated Midsummer Night's Dream-themed event. However, her starter fails to win the approval of shellfish-hating Claire Wier, and Tim Lawson disapproves on the basis of his friendship with fish. Everyone is surprised as the hostess brings out an unusual dessert, and a guest appearance by her singing dog Buddy rounds off a memorable evening.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Publican Tim Lawson hosts the third dinner party in Worcestershire, laying on a country-themed evening featuring a novel take on prawn cocktail and a creamy main course. Chris Sheppard finds himself confronted about his tan, while tension mounts between Pippa Langhorne and Claire Wier, who takes issue with her fellow diner's claims to have a white bread allergy.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teresa Cox hosts the fourth dinner party challenge from Worcestershire and sets her store on wooing the guests with a lobster starter and an extravagant main course. The menu seems to go down well with the diners, but when the conversation turns to the paranormal there are mixed reactions.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Sheppard hosts the final dinner party in Worcestershire, throwing a black-tie-themed evening. He impresses some of his guests with his home-made sweet chilli sauce and potato towers - although Claire Wier finds the presentation pretentious - before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former pop singer Danny Karne welcomes guests to the Pavilion, his fashion and rock 'n' roll-themed hotel in central London, and the sports car parked outside wows his visitors. But the petrol-head's decision to take his fellow hoteliers to a motoring museum goes down badly when one of them reveals he has no passion for cars.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: John Luce and his partner Pat Sutton invite their fellow hoteliers to the Fox and Duck, a country inn in Therfield, Hertfordshire. The local golf club provides the guests with adequate entertainment, and they appear to bond as they share friendly banter and a spot of singing at the end of the night. However, the following morning brings with it a shower disaster.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dave and Debbie Lang, who run the New Inn in Newbridge-on-Wye, Powys, play host. Dave is a keen pig breeder and owns the on-site butcher's shop as well as running a pub, so he serves some of his award-winning pork products for breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Kerstin and Robert Sharpe, the owners of Westleigh Farm in Somerset, play host, and despite the initial cobwebs found by some of the guests, they are soon won over by the size of the showers, the quality of the milk and the generous helpings for breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Ben and Rachel Hammond have spent a year searching London for somewhere exciting to live with their two daughters, and they have finally stumbled on a 1950s home on a unique plot, situated within the leafy depths of a park in the south of the city. The only problem is the house itself - an ugly, inefficient and uninspiring property - and their solution is to radically transform it into a sleek, modernist masterpiece. But this is no easy task, as Kevin McCloud finds out.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 22-year-old cyclist is rushed to St George's Hospital after he collided with a car on the way to work and 'bullseyed' its rear window. Since he was not wearing a helmet, doctors send him for a CT scan to assess whether he has sustained a serious head injury, or life-changing damage to his neck, spine or internal organs. Meanwhile, 91-year-old Peter arrives at A&E three nights after suffering a fall at home, and 26-year-old Emma needs treatment for a head wound sustained during an epileptic seizure.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 71-year-old woman is rushed in after being knocked over by her husband's car, and her blood pressure has dropped critically low. Four-year-old Maddi is brought in with an injured neck after falling over on a train, and doctors worry that metal plates she already had in her neck may have shifted, causing damage to her spine. Plus, 68-year-old Bonnie arrives after hitting her head on her bedside table.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Jack, Dougal and Ted head off for a summer break at a caravan park. However, they immediately get on the wrong side of their fellow holiday-makers, and matters become even more dire when Father Noel Furlong turns up - with his hapless youth group in tow. Comedy, guest starring Graham Norton.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Devon County Show, where she tries to impress the judges with scones and unconventional kumquat eclairs in the afternoon tea tent, which is famed for its competitive atmosphere.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw secretly restore a 1960s Mercedes-Benz 230SL Pagoda, which the owner had to abandon after suffering a heart attack.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore an Aston Martin DB6 for its owner, who has been prevented from working on it by a serious fall and chronic health problems.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a Renault 5 GT Turbo belonging to a man who was forced to abandon work on it after suffering serious organ failure.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In 2003, Phil Spencer and Kirstie Allsopp were tasked with finding homes that would bring two pairs of lovebirds together. A frustrating 10-mile gap was keeping Annmarie and Robert apart, while 300 miles separated Alison and Martin. Twelve years later, the hosts find out whether either or both couples remain together in the United Kingdom.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with two house-hunters who were searching for properties in 2002. They revisit anaesthetist Ian from Cheltenham, who was looking for a Regency property, and single mum Sehyr from Windsor, who was after a Victorian style home.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners of Guest and the City, Dan and Mardi Leonard, welcome their visitors in Brighton, but there is a mixed reaction to the couple's contemporary decor and stained glass windows. The unconventional furniture leaves some guests confused, and one pair of fellow hoteliers bemoan the lack of sausages at breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Phil Kiernan invites the contestants to the Farmer's Boy Inn in Longhope, Gloucestershire, where he challenges them to a pie-making competition. However, the task proves less entertaining than the bickering that occurs between two guests as they try to share a kitchen.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Alan and Jane Asher host on the Geanna, their purpose-built hotel boat. Dan and Mardi Leonard are concerned space is too tight, while Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa worry about their privacy being invaded. A trip up the Thames allows the guests to sip champagne and get to know the ropes, but the mood at dinner is subdued, and when the owners cook their first breakfast on board they find themselves bickering.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Sarah Langford and Jean-Pierre Kujawa, who have run the Sentry Mead B&B on the Isle of Wight for six years, play host in the last challenge of the week. The guests arrive with high expectations and after a few setbacks, the dinner and breakfast win everyone over.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vicki Fairbrother hosts the first party in East Lancashire, hoping her steak main and banoffee pie dessert will be enough to win her the £1,000 prize. However, she must contend with self-confessed snob Chelsea Symcox, perfectionist Chris Slater, entrepreneur Jenna Tattersall and hairdresser Nigel Womack if she is to walk away with the cash at the end of the week.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businesswoman Jenna Tattersall hosts the second dinner party in East Lancashire, but an unimpressed Chelsea Symcox suspects the stuffed courgette starter is intended to send a message to the guests. Jenna's decision to hire a bouncy castle as post-meal entertainment also causes concern.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chris Slater tries to add some class to proceedings as he hosts the third dinner party in East Lancashire, but his habit of chewing with his mouth open disgusts his guests. The spicy main course gives Jenna Tattersall acid reflux, and Nigel Womack has an embarrassing incident with a shortbread biscuit.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Chelsea Symcox hosts the fourth party in East Lancashire. While the boys fight over a punch-bag in the garage, the girls discover a secret about their host when they find her credit card. Chelsea hopes her Mediterranean menu is enough to win her the £1,000 prize at the end of the week.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Nigel Womack hosts the final dinner party in East Lancashire, hoping his romantic evening will impress his guests. With a menu featuring aphrodisiacs, he aims to create an amorous mood among his diners, and also sings a song before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a master craftsman whose dream is to build a castle in rural Devon made entirely of mud. Kevin McCabe plans to form the huge property out of two vast curved roundhouses - the largest of which is inspired by the natural geometry of a snail shell - connected by glazing and topped with wildflower meadow roofs to mirror the surrounding countryside. However, the project involves mixing and laying a mind-boggling 2,000 tons of cob, all during warm, sunny weather - and the sheer scale of the task soon becomes clear.(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, paramedics Paul Johnson and Maddie Murray are called out in the early hours of the morning to a 60-year-old patient with severe chest pains.(n)

programme.title: Inside Birmingham Children's Hospital
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on parents who go the extra mile to care for their children. They include Rob, who swapped life on the road as a long-haul trucker to become the primary carer to his four-year-old daughter Chelsea, who was born with a serious kidney disorder and has spent more than 200 nights of her life in hospital. Meanwhile, Shafak is bringing up four children by herself, including Eman, who also has a kidney condition, meaning more than a cupful of water a day could kill her. The seven-year-old is drinking more than her allowance - so Shafak must be a loving mother and disciplinarian at the same time.(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Wiltshire's emergency services deal with people who live alone, including an elderly woman who has suffered a fall but is clearly longing for a chat. Police are also called out to a residential estate in Swindon where neighbours have reported consistent antisocial behaviour from Tracey, an aggressive and combustible woman who lives alone. She is brought in on a drunk and disorderly charge, but once in custody the officers see another side to her personality.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A road traffic accident caused 52-year-old Mark to suffer cardiac arrest, and as he battles for survival at St George's Hospital, his wife Jacquie reminisces about how their relationship blossomed from friendship into romance. A severe hip dislocation seems to be the diagnosis when 25-year-old Kayley arrives in A&E after being thrown from her horse, and 23-year-old receptionist Melissa books an appointment with nurse practitioner Craig to find out why she is having trouble hearing.(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, paramedics Paul Johnson and Maddie Murray are called out in the early hours of the morning to a 60-year-old patient with severe chest pains.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits California, where his job is to help the owner of Lido Di Manhattan. Lisa Marie Hemmat, an ambitious business school graduate, has been running the restaurant for the past five years, but has failed to exert any control over the kitchen and the menu. The chef tries to teach her the basics of cooking and venue management, but trouble brews when her staff threaten to walk out on relaunch night.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The priests organise a raffle to raise funds to repair their leaky roof, planning to award a car as the prize. Unfortunately, Ted accidentally wrecks it before the grand draw takes place, and embarks on a frantic search for a replacement. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon play the Craggy Island clerics.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps man to create a fun bedroom for his two daughters. She creates a pinboard using a bold vintage fabric, and a garland from the felt offcuts. Plus, the girls help to personalise some jewellery boxes.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps Lincolnshire couple Peter and Diane Bates, who have long dreamt of enjoying a Mediterranean lifestyle in Spain, showing them traditional properties for under £35,000 in the province of Malaga.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items, and their latest find is an old bureau which gets a makeover in Yorkshire.(n)

programme.desc: Simon O'Brien recycles some historic oak while Henry Cole comes unstuck when he tries to get to grips with an old Ford Escort.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Nigel tackles dated windows and Debbie creates her first mural as the duo set to work transforming a room in a rundown conservatory into a bright new garden room.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton visits rural Northamptonshire, where new couple Rob and Jan want to build a vicarage-style home to carry them into retirement. Rob and Jan aren't big on decision-making, and it remains to be seen whether Charlie will succeed on getting them to agree on anything.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Hope Mountain in Cymau, Flintshire, where husband and wife team Rob and Jo Smith hope their dog-friendly B&B will win the day.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At the Beaumont Hotel in Louth, Lincolnshire, two guests are damning about the breakfast quality, so it remains to be seen how managers Steffi Stevenson and Sarah Banks will react.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Rock House Hotel in Lynmouth, Devon, where owner Emilio Tundidor is being ably assisted by his identical twin brother Fernando.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Troy House in Painswick, Gloucestershire, where owners Alan and Denise Newman hope the guests will love their rooms, but Emilio and Fernando are on the warpath.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day in the competition sees the B&B owners meet up for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some scores.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien turn an old, unloved filing cabinet into a valuable and desirable storage unit and convert a Bakelite voltmeter into a retro Bluetooth speaker.(n)

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Veteran actors and married couple Timothy West and Prunella Scales celebrate their 50th wedding anniversary with four adventures around the canal networks of Britain and France. In the first edition, the pair head to the West Country to travel along the fully restored Kennet and Avon canal. Taking in the sights, characters and wildlife from Bath to Devizes, Wiltshire, the duo enjoy an eventful journey along the picturesque 21-mile stretch of water.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Stephanie has plans to give her apartment in the chateau's east wing a renaissance revival. However, support from Gerry and mother Isabelle turns out to be more of a hindrance.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Michael Butcher and Phil Palmer want to bring a touch of urban glamour to their new home at Christmas Farm near Newbury, Berkshire, by creating a modern farmhouse that combines an open-plan party pad with functional spaces below. As the builders set to work on the handcrafted flint exterior, complete with a vast trapezoid window, the pair juggle construction with farming the land, and in an attempt to make the project work financially, they set up a microbrewery in the barn. programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May take a look at increasingly popular tall hatchbacks known as crossovers. Having concluded their primary appeal is to caravanners, the duo spend a couple of days in models by Mazda and Volkswagen and try to get a feel for what life is like for the people they believe would buy one. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond drives a pair of exciting Lamborghinis in Italy - the ferocious Aventador Roadster and the limited-edition Sesto Elemento, which carries an eye-watering price tag of around £2million. Two cars are also put through their paces on the test track, with James in a modern re-creation of the classic Porsche 911 and Aerosmith frontman Steven Tyler in the rather less exotic Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Scrapyard Supercar
programme.desc: Engineer Ralph Hosier champions two teams of car lovers on their mission to design and build scrap vehicles capable of beating pro-driver Shane Lynch's supercar in a daring challenge. This time, they take on the iconic Lamborghini Huracan Performante in a handling head to head. Their mechanical ingenuity and driving skills are put to the ultimate test as they race against both the supercar and the clock.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson drives the Jaguar F-Type sports car on some of Britain's finest roads, while Richard Hammond jumps inside the Range Rover Sport and gives it a thorough workout off-road, on a track and in what he believes is its most natural habitat - the lanes of Cheshire. James May goes for a countryside adventure in the New Routemaster London bus brought into use in 2013, which is propelled by a turbodiesel generator and a powerful electric motor. Inspired by the machines they have tested, the trio then meet to celebrate Britain's motor industry with a grand finale in front of Buckingham Palace. Plus, former Formula One driver Mark Webber takes to the track for a lap in the Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on a 45-mile walk across Wiltshire, from Avebury to Stonehenge, telling the story of the remarkable development that occurred in the latter days of the Neolithic era. His route over chalk downlands and Salisbury Plain takes him through one of the greatest concentrations of prehistoric sites in Europe.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: It was 30 years after the Romans invaded Britain that they were ready to take on the challenge of conquering the Lake District. With the toughest landscape they had encountered in the nation, peopled by a rebellious tribe, it was no small task, but within a few years, the whole of Lakeland was under their control. Tony Robinson tackles the journey by himself, walking 50 miles from Penrith to Ambleside and on to the Irish Sea at Ravenglass, discovering that the Romans encountered beauty and danger in equal measure.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Murder Mysteries
programme.desc: The theories, conspiracies and facts relating to Rudolf Hess's dramatic flight to Scotland in 1941 and his subsequent death in Spandau prison.(n)

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Kevin Norris and Kieran Chisnall move three state-of-the-art trains, fresh in from Japan. They need to transport them from the North East port of Redcar to a factory in Doncaster.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Anglophile Derek struggles to get his message across on a rare trip abroad to pick up a Bentley, while a well-restored Ford XR2 sets the auction alight.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A delightful collection of British classics comes up for auction, including an Austin A35 and a Hillman Avenger Estate in stunning condition. An E-Type Jaguar also hits the auction.(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the lives of the planet's largest marine mammals and the secrets of their survival. Cameramen Doug Allan and Didier Noirot travel from the Indian Ocean to the Arctic seas, filming 200-ton blue whales and fighting humpbacks. The team also discovers that southern right whales possess a pair of one-ton testicles and reveals how Arctic bowheads can live to be more than 200 years old. Narrated by Stephen Fry.(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: The documentary explores the intelligence of marine mammals, discovering just how smart whales and dolphins really are. Scientist Denise Herzing talks about the development of a two-way communication system between dolphins and humans in the Bahamas, while in Western Australia the creatures are filmed using a range of survival skills. In Mexico, grey whales seemingly empathise with humans, while the humpbacks of Alaska pool their talents to increase hunting success. Narrated by Stephen Fry.(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants
programme.desc: Stephen Fry narrates this documentary exploring the vocal ranges of marine mammals. Sperm whales produce clicks to locate giant squid two miles beneath the ocean surface, and narwhals use a similar technique to find breathing holes in Arctic ice floes. Bottlenose dolphins communicate with fishermen in Brazil, humpbacks offer haunting operatic performances and boto dolphins create bat-like ultrasonic calls to help find fish in the murky Amazon River.(n)

programme.title: Ocean Giants

programme.title: Sounds of the Seventies
programme.desc: A collection of studio and concert performances from the decade, featuring the Carpenters, Wings, Abba and Kate Bush.(n)

programme.title: Sounds of the Seventies
programme.desc: Selection of archive performances from the decade, including music by singer-songwriters including Carole King, James Taylor, Neil Young, Randy Newman and Don McLean.(n)

programme.title: Prince Philip: The Plot to Make a King
programme.desc: Secret History documentary telling the inside story of the dynastic tensions that were unleashed when Princess Elizabeth, the future queen, fell in love with Prince Philip. It was felt that Philip was rough and ill-mannered - and with the Second World War still fresh in most people's minds, the royal and political elite disliked his German roots. But following the death of King George VI in 1952, the establishment feared a dynastic coup, with the Queen torn between the two sides. The documentary examines the complexities and frustrations of the royal marriage, as the monarch struggled to reconcile the love of her husband with the suspicions of her family and her government.(n)

programme.title: The Queen's Castle
programme.desc: The Duke of Edinburgh, in his capacity as Ranger of the Great Park, takes a tour of Windsor's grounds and points out the modifications he has made during his tenure, including a deer park and a farm shop selling local produce. He then competes in the Royal Horse Show, which also features Prince Harry. Meanwhile, the Prince of Wales and the Duchess of Cornwall host a special banquet for the Prince's Trust.(n)

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built
programme.desc: Tim Dunn goes behind the scenes at London's King's Cross station and finds out about the disused funicular railway hidden in the Avon Gorge in Bristol, blasted out of the cliff.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, scorched remains that speak of imprisonment and torture and vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on a 45-mile walk across Wiltshire, from Avebury to Stonehenge, telling the story of the remarkable development that occurred in the latter days of the Neolithic era. programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a four-day trek along the coastline between Plymouth in Devon and Falmouth, learning about the thriving smuggling trade in Cornwall during the late 18th century. The area's tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves were ideal for illicit imports such as tobacco and brandy, and the business was so huge it threatened the national economy. Along his route, visiting such beauty spots as Lantic Bay and Polperro, he encounters all sorts of reminders of the trade and meets descendants of those involved.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britain's most historic landscapes. He begins with a towpath exploration of industrial engineering along the Leeds and Liverpool Canal. programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: The World at War

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson takes a four-day trek along the coastline between Plymouth in Devon and Falmouth, learning about the thriving smuggling trade in Cornwall during the late 18th century. The area's tiny secretive harbours, beaches and secluded coves were ideal for illicit imports such as tobacco and brandy, and the business was so huge it threatened the national economy. Along his route, visiting such beauty spots as Lantic Bay and Polperro, he encounters all sorts of reminders of the trade and meets descendants of those involved.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britain's most historic landscapes. programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson explores the history of the ancient kingdom on a walk from Melrose in the Scottish Borders to Holy Island off the coast of Northumberland. Over five days, he goes on the trail of one of Northumbria's greatest sons - Saint Cuthbert. Through the Tweed Valley and across the Cheviot Hills, it's a journey through a murky history laden with myth. However, by investigating the communities, power bases and landscape of seventh-century Northumbria, Tony aims to understand the pagan land in which Cuthbert spread his simple brand of Celtic Christianity.(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson travels along the north Norfolk coast through one of the least developed spots in Britain, finding out how the area maintained its rural, remote identity despite the dynamic industrial changes of the Victorian age. From the arrival of Bertie, Prince of Wales at Sandringham House to the opening of Cromer Pier, Tony's four-day walk sees him learn about key periods in the county's history. He explores prime shooting estates, purpose-built seaside resorts, salt marshes and disused railway lines as he discovers how powerful landowners were able to control development and even shape the railways to suit their needs.(n)
